/*# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64, */</style><style>.privacyModalContainer {
  width: 100% !important;
  position: fixed;
  background: none;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding-bottom: 0;
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
  -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
  -moz-transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
  -ms-transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
  -o-transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
}

.PrivacyModal {
  display: table !important;
  height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
}

.ibm-common-overlay-table {
  display: table !important;
  height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
}

.ibm-common-overlay-row {
  display: table-cell !important;
  padding: 20px;
  vertical-align: middle;
}

.ibm-common-overlay-inner {
  background-color: #fff;
  margin: auto;
  position: relative;
  vertical-align: middle;
  width: 700px;
}

.ibm-common-overlay-inner.privacy-cancel-confirm {
  max-width: 450px;
}

.ibm-overlay-heading-con {
  height: 30px;
}

.privacy-content-area {
  padding: 0 40px;
}

.privacy-content-area h1.ibm-h2 {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
}

.ReactModal__Body--open #ibm-overlay-backdrop {
  display: block;
}

#ibm-overlay-backdrop {
  opacity: 0.2;
}

.privacy-top {
  border-bottom: 2px solid #4178be;
}

.privacy-top p {
  font-size: 14px;
}

ul li.cds--list__item {
  padding-left: inherit
}

.no-border a {
  border-top: none;
}

.privacy-cancel-confirm {
  padding: 40px;
}

.ibm-show-hide {
  border-bottom: 2px solid #4178be;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.ibm-show-hide>h2 a {
  font-size: 14px;
  padding: 10px 0 10px 30px;
}

div[aria-label=Acknowledgement] h2.ibm-h3 {
  display: none;
}

div[aria-label=Acknowledgement] p {
  font-size: 14px;
}

div[aria-label=modified-date]>div>p {
  font-size: 9px;
}

.ibm-btn-row>button.ibm-btn-sec {
  border: 1px solid #4178be;
}

.ibm-show-hide>.ibm-container-body * {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 0px) and (max-width: 550px) {
  .privacyModalContainer {
    background: #fff;
    width: 100% !important;
  }

  .ibm-common-overlay-row {
    padding: 0;
    vertical-align: top;
  }

  .ibm-common-overlay-inner {
    width: auto !important;
  }

  .privacy-content-area {
    padding: 0 30px;
  }
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 551px) and (max-height: 650px) {
  .privacy-top {
    display: none;
  }
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 551px) and (max-width: 700px) {
  .ibm-common-overlay-inner {
    width: 100%;
  }
}

.ReactModal__Body--open {
  overflow: hidden;
}

/*# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64, */</style><script type="text/javascript" async="" charset="utf-8" id="tiqapp" src="//tags.tiqcdn.com/utag/ibm/web/prod/utag.v.js?a=ibm/web/202606250401&cb=1782580704914"></script><script type="text/javascript" async="" charset="utf-8" id="utag_ibm.web_199" src="//tags.tiqcdn.com/utag/ibm/web/prod/utag.199.js?utv=ut4.54.202606250401"></script><style id="@playkit-js/kaltura-player-js">.kaltura-player-container {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  position: relative;
  background-color: #000;
  outline: none;
  -webkit-touch-callout: none;
  -webkit-user-select: none;
  -moz-user-select: none;
  -ms-user-select: none;
  user-select: none;
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
}

/*# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64, */</style><style id="@playkit-js/playkit-js">.playkit-container {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  color: #fff;
  outline: none;
  -webkit-touch-callout: none;
  -webkit-user-select: none;
  -moz-user-select: none;
  -ms-user-select: none;
  user-select: none;
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
}

.playkit-engine {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  object-fit: contain;
}

.playkit-engine video::-webkit-media-controls-panel,
.playkit-engine video::-webkit-media-controls-panel-container,
.playkit-engine video::-webkit-media-controls-start-playback-button,
.playkit-engine video::-webkit-media-controls-play-button {
  display: none;
  -webkit-appearance: none;
}

.playkit-poster {
  position: absolute;
  display: block;
  top: -1px;
  bottom: -1px;
  left: -1px;
  right: -1px;
  background-size: contain;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-color: var(--playkit-player-background-color);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.playkit-subtitles {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  right: 0;
  left: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.playkit-black-cover {
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-color: black;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.playkit-size-iframe {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  position: absolute;
  border: 0;
  z-index: -100;
}

.playkit-in-browser-fullscreen-mode {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  position: fixed !important;
  top: 0 !important;
  left: 0 !important;
  /*added for blocking element with fixed position which could be on the top of the player */
  z-index: 999999 !important;
}

  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  width: 100%;
  min-width: 48px;
  transition: bottom cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) 0.1s;
  transition-delay: 0s;
  font-size: 20px;
  line-height: 1.4;
  color: #fff;
  font-family: Roboto-Regular, Roboto, sans-serif, TengwarTelcontar;
}
.shaka-text-container span.shaka-text-wrapper {
  display: inline;
  background: 0 0;
  text-align: center;
}

:fullscreen .shaka-text-container {
  font-size: 4.4vmin;
}

:-webkit-full-screen .shaka-text-container {
  font-size: 4.4vmin;
}

:-moz-full-screen .shaka-text-container {
  font-size: 4.4vmin;
}

:-ms-fullscreen .shaka-text-container {
  font-size: 4.4vmin;
}

<script type="text/javascript">
    if (window.location.href.includes("/careers"))
      {
         document.querySelector('c4d-masthead-container').setAttribute("has-search","false");
         document.querySelector('c4d-masthead-container').setAttribute("has-profile","false");

      }

      if(window.location.hostname.includes("businessofgovernment") ||  window.location.href.includes("/businessofgovernment"))
        {
              // Start the function
        updateTopNavHrefFromPlatform();
        }

     function updateTopNavHrefFromPlatform() {
    // Step 1: get the masthead container
    var mastheadContainer = document.querySelector('c4d-masthead-container');
    if (!mastheadContainer) {
        setTimeout(updateTopNavHrefFromPlatform, 5000); // retry if not yet loaded
        return;
    }

    // Step 2: get the platform URL
    var platformUrl = mastheadContainer.getAttribute('platformurl');
    if (!platformUrl) {
        console.log('No platformurl found');
        return;
    }

    // Step 3: get the masthead shadow root
    var masthead = document.querySelector('c4d-masthead');
    if (!masthead || !masthead.shadowRoot) {
        setTimeout(updateTopNavHrefFromPlatform, 5000);
        return;
    }

    // Step 4: get the nav container inside shadow DOM
    var navContainer = masthead.shadowRoot.querySelector('.cds--header__nav-container');
    if (!navContainer) {
        setTimeout(updateTopNavHrefFromPlatform, 5000);
        return;
    }

    // Step 5: get the slot inside nav container
    var slot = navContainer.querySelector('slot');
    if (!slot) {
        setTimeout(updateTopNavHrefFromPlatform, 5000);
        return;
    }

    // Step 6: get all assigned nodes to the slot
    var assignedNodes = slot.assignedNodes();
    for (var i = 0; i < assignedNodes.length; i++) {
        var node = assignedNodes[i];
        if (node.tagName && node.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'c4d-top-nav-name') {
            // Step 7: set href from platformurl
            node.setAttribute('href', platformUrl);
            console.log('Updated href to', platformUrl);
        }
    }
}
       document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
          const mastheadContainer = document.querySelector("c4d-masthead-container");
        
        if (mastheadContainer && mastheadContainer.getAttribute("has-global") === "false") {
            document.querySelector('.earth-language-icon').style.display = 'none';
        }
        else{
            document.querySelector('.earth-language-icon').style.setProperty('display', 'block', 'important');
        }

    if (mastheadContainer && mastheadContainer.getAttribute("brand") === "businessofgovernment") {
            const isMobile = window.matchMedia("(max-width: 671px)").matches;
            if (isMobile) {
                const langIcon = document.querySelector('.earth-language-icon');
                if (langIcon) {
                    langIcon.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important');
                }
            } else {
                const globalBar = document.querySelector('c4d-masthead-global-bar');
                if (globalBar) globalBar.style.display = 'none';
            }
        }

            
      });
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
        const localeButton = document.querySelector("c4d-locale-button");
        if (localeButton) {
            localeButton.style.display = "none";
        }
    });

     if(window.location.hostname.includes("businessofgovernment") ||  window.location.href.includes("/businessofgovernment"))
        {

              hideCookiePreferencesInSlot();
        }

     function hideCookiePreferencesInSlot() {
            // Step 1: get the legal nav component
            var legalNav = document.querySelector('c4d-legal-nav');
            if (!legalNav) {
                setTimeout(hideCookiePreferencesInSlot, 3000);
                return;
            }

            // Step 2: get its shadow root
            var shadow = legalNav.shadowRoot;
            if (!shadow) {
                setTimeout(hideCookiePreferencesInSlot, 3000);
                return;
            }

            // Step 3: find the slot inside the shadow DOM
            var slot = shadow.querySelector('slot');
            if (!slot) {
                setTimeout(hideCookiePreferencesInSlot, 3000);
                return;
            }

            // Step 4: get all assigned nodes from the slot
            var assignedNodes = slot.assignedNodes({ flatten: true });

            // Step 5: loop through assigned nodes to find the cookie placeholder
            assignedNodes.forEach(node => {
                if (node.tagName && node.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'c4d-legal-nav-cookie-preferences-placeholder') {
                    // Hide the element
                    node.style.display = 'none';
                    console.log('Cookie preferences placeholder hidden!');
                }
            });
        }
</script>

<!-- Added for Adobe analytics implementation ADCMS-5834 & ADCMS-6152 !-->
<script type="text/javascript">
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
        var templatePath = "\/conf\/adobe\u002Dcms\u002Deditable\/settings\/wcm\/templates\/full\u002Dwidth\u002Dlayout\u002Danchor\u002Dlinks";
        var templateName = templatePath.split('/').pop();
        const currentUrl = document.URL;
        const [baseUrl, queryString] = currentUrl.split('?');
        const urlWithoutProtocolAndDomain = baseUrl.replace(/^https?:\/\/[^\/]+\//, '');
        const segments = urlWithoutProtocolAndDomain.split('/').filter(segment => segment);
        const localePattern = /^[a-z]{2}-[a-z]{2}$/;
        const cleanedSegments = segments.filter(segment => !localePattern.test(segment));
        const firstSegment = cleanedSegments[0] || "";
        const secondSegment = cleanedSegments[1] || "";
        const thirdSegment = cleanedSegments[2] || "";
        const lastModified = "Tue Jun 02 15:20:33 UTC 2026";
        var isoDate="";
        if (lastModified.includes("UTC")) {
               const date = new Date(lastModified);
               isoDate = date.toISOString();
        } else {
                 isoDate = lastModified;
        }

        if (currentUrl.includes("/products")) {
            callProductPageLoadEvent();
        }

        function callProductPageLoadEvent(){
            adobeDataLayer.push({
                "event": "productPageLoad",
                "commerce": {
                    "productViews": {
                        "value": 1
                     }
                },
                "productListItems": {
                    "name": secondSegment,
                    "productCategories": {
                        "categoryName": thirdSegment
                    }
                },
                "web": {
                    "webPageDetails": {
                        "URL": document.URL,
                        "name": cleanUrl(window.location.host) + " | " + templateName + " | Envizi",
                        "siteSection": firstSegment
                    },
                    "webReferrer": {
                        "URL": document.referrer
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        function getCookieByName(name) {
            const cookieArr = document.cookie.split(';');
            for (let i = 0; i < cookieArr.length; i++) {
                const cookie = cookieArr[i].trim();
                if (cookie.startsWith(name + "=")) {
                    return cookie.substring(name.length + 1);
                }
            }
            return null;
        }

        function getContextCookie(name) {
  		    const cookieArr = document.cookie.split(';');
            for (let i = 0; i < cookieArr.length; i++) {
              const cookie = cookieArr[i].trim();

                        reached75: false,

                            if (!milestones.reachedStart) {

                        if (percentageWatched >= 50 && !milestones.reached50) {

                        if (percentageWatched >= 75 && !milestones.reached75) {
                            milestones.reached75 = true;
                            pushVideoEvent("video75");
